reforms.description: The French government has initiated a reorientation of its incentive appropriations policy to better support research projects that address public objectives and to reduce dead-weight losses associated with funding projects that companies would have undertaken anyway.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By targeting funding towards projects with societal benefits, the reform aims to enhance the effectiveness of public investment in innovation, thereby fostering economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The government has taken measures to reform the Atout programme and increase the repayment rate.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform represents a significant shift in how public funding is allocated, focusing on projects with greater societal relevance, which can lead to improved innovation outcomes.
reforms.source_quote: The government has initiated a reorientation of its incentive appropriations’ policy in 1998.

reforms.description: The National Agency for the Promotion of Research (ANVAR) provides SMEs with preferential loans to finance their innovative activities, although the total authorizations have decreased over the years.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By offering financial support to SMEs, the reform aims to stimulate innovation and enhance the competitiveness of smaller firms in the market.
reforms.status_evidence: ANVAR authorisations have been provided to SMEs for financing innovative activities.
reforms.importance_rationale: While the funding has decreased, the continued support for SMEs is crucial for fostering innovation in the private sector.
reforms.source_quote: The National Agency for the Promotion of Research (ANVAR) provides SMEs with preferential loans to finance their innovative activities.

reforms.description: The draft 1999 Budget Law amends the provisions for the Research Tax Credit (RTC), extending it for another five years and making it a negotiable claim to assist SMEs in their dealings with banks, while also making it immediately refundable for start-ups during their first three years of business.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The extension and modification of the RTC is expected to enhance corporate R&D investment, particularly among SMEs and start-ups, thereby fostering innovation and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The provisions for the RTC were amended and extended as part of the 1999 Budget Law.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform significantly alters the structure and duration of the RTC, which is a key instrument for stimulating R&D investment in France, particularly for SMEs.
reforms.source_quote: The draft 1999 Budget Law amends the provisions for the RTC, which has been extended for another five years.

reforms.description: The forthcoming creation of a National Science Fund aims to allocate appropriations for fundamental research with a focus on potential spin-offs, enhancing the interaction between research institutions and enterprises.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By focusing on potential spin-offs, the fund is expected to promote applied research and commercialization, thereby contributing to economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The forthcoming creation of a National Science Fund is intended to meet the need to develop interactions between research institutions and enterprises.
reforms.importance_rationale: The establishment of the National Science Fund represents a significant step towards enhancing the funding landscape for fundamental research in France, with potential long-term impacts on innovation.
reforms.source_quote: The forthcoming creation of a National Science Fund, whose criteria for allocating appropriations for fundamental research will focus to a large extent on potential spin-offs.

reforms.description: The Prime Minister announces a package of additional measures to promote innovation, including the creation of a national technological research network, a reform of the status of researchers, and an overhaul of the rules applying to stock options.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The measures aim to enhance the research environment and incentivize innovation, which can lead to increased productivity and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The Prime Minister announced the measures at the Innovation Congress.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant shift in the government's approach to fostering innovation through structured support and resources, impacting the entire research and innovation ecosystem.
reforms.source_quote: At the Innovation Congress, the Prime Minister announces a package of additional measures to promote innovation, including the creation of a national technological research network.

reforms.description: The French authorities have launched a series of measures to improve technological innovation and encourage its diffusion, including tax incentives for life insurance contracts invested in venture capital and for capital gains reinvested in young companies.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: These measures are designed to stimulate investment in innovative firms, thereby enhancing their capacity to grow and create jobs.
reforms.status_evidence: A series of measures has been implemented since the last Survey to improve technological innovation.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant shift in the approach to supporting innovation through financial incentives, addressing previous barriers to venture capital investment.
reforms.source_quote: Important initiatives have been launched to improve technological innovation and encourage diffusion incentives, drawing on the experience of other OECD countries.

reforms.description: A public venture capital fund has been launched to provide leverage for private venture capital, aiming to alleviate the scarcity of capital that hampers innovation.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By facilitating access to capital for innovative firms, this fund is expected to enhance their growth potential and contribute to job creation.
reforms.status_evidence: The public venture capital fund has been launched to provide leverage for private venture capital.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform is a major step in addressing the funding gap for innovative startups, which is critical for fostering a vibrant entrepreneurial ecosystem.
reforms.source_quote: A public venture capital fund has been launched, the aim of which is to provide leverage for private venture capital.

reforms.description: The easing of regulations for mutual funds investing in innovative companies is expected to boost the supply of venture capital.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Increases the availability of venture capital, which is crucial for funding innovative startups and fostering economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The easing of the regulations for mutual funds investing in innovative companies is being prepared.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform is significant as it aims to enhance the venture capital landscape, which is vital for supporting innovative firms.
reforms.source_quote: The supply of venture capital should also be boosted by the easing of the regulations for mutual funds investing in innovative companies.

reforms.description: The French government launched the 'New Services, New Jobs' programme to create jobs for young people in emerging sectors not covered by the public or market sectors, subsidizing these positions significantly.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: This initiative aims to reduce youth unemployment by creating job opportunities, thereby enhancing the skills of young workers and contributing to the labor market.
reforms.status_evidence: The programme has successfully created over 150,000 jobs by mid-November 1998.
reforms.importance_rationale: This programme represents a significant structural change in addressing youth unemployment and skill development, with a large target of job creation.
reforms.source_quote: The 'New Services, New Jobs' programme aims to encourage the creation of jobs that will fill emerging needs not met by the public sector nor by the market.

reforms.description: A bill on innovation was submitted to allow vocational/technical schools to sell services in the context of technology transfers to enterprises, increasing partnership agreements between schools and businesses.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Facilitates the transfer of technology and knowledge from educational institutions to the private sector, enhancing innovation and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: Submission of a bill on innovation allowing schools to sell services.
reforms.importance_rationale: The initiative represents a significant step towards enhancing collaboration between educational institutions and the private sector, which is crucial for fostering innovation.
reforms.source_quote: Submission of a bill on innovation allowing schools to sell services in the context of transfers of technology to enterprises.

reforms.description: The French government has undertaken ambitious structural reforms to enhance the economic efficiency of technology research and innovation policies, aiming to increase the innovative dynamics of firms by changing incentive systems and promoting technology diffusion.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By improving the efficiency of innovation policies, the reforms are expected to stimulate private sector investment and enhance the overall innovative capacity of the economy.
reforms.status_evidence: The reforms were announced at the Innovation Congress in May 1998 and have been put into action.
reforms.importance_rationale: These reforms represent a significant shift in the approach to innovation policy in France, aiming to address structural issues and enhance the role of market forces in driving innovation.
reforms.source_quote: The French government, aware of the growing costs of these rigidities, has undertaken ambitious structural reforms in order to increase the economic efficiency of technology research and innovation policies.

reforms.description: The French government is implementing measures to create a more responsive public research sector and funding system for industrial research, aimed at promoting innovation in the private sector, particularly among small firms.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By fostering a more responsive public research sector, the measures are expected to enhance innovation capabilities in the private sector, particularly benefiting small firms.
reforms.status_evidence: The measures are described as being implemented to encourage innovation.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant shift in the approach to public funding and its responsiveness to economic needs, which is crucial for enhancing innovation in the private sector.
reforms.source_quote: The object of these measures is, firstly, to create the climate for a public research sector and a public funding system for industrial research that is more responsive to the needs of the economy and to public demand.

reforms.description: The French government is establishing networks linking public laboratories and enterprises, including SMEs, to facilitate collaboration and enhance public research funding.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: These networks are designed to enhance collaboration between public and private sectors, which can lead to increased innovation and commercialization of research findings.
reforms.status_evidence: The government is setting up networks linking public laboratories and enterprises.
reforms.importance_rationale: This initiative represents a significant effort to enhance collaboration between public and private sectors, which is essential for fostering innovation.
reforms.source_quote: The French government is setting up networks linking public laboratories and enterprises, including SMEs, in well-defined fields, which will receive a share of public research funding.

reforms.description: The French government aims to allocate 25% of all financed projects to SMEs, following the American model, to address the structural bias favoring larger firms.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By increasing SME access to funding, the initiative is expected to enhance innovation and competition in the market.
reforms.status_evidence: The objective announced by the Ministry of Economy, Finance and Industry.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant shift in funding allocation towards SMEs, which is crucial for fostering innovation and entrepreneurship.
reforms.source_quote: The objective announced by the Ministry of Economy, Finance and Industry, namely to allocate to SMEs a 25 per cent share of all the projects it finances.

reforms.description: The French government is working on establishing a start-up fund to provide seed capital for biotechnology companies and to create a network of public laboratories and private firms.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Providing seed capital is expected to stimulate the growth of biotechnology firms, enhancing innovation and economic development in this sector.
reforms.status_evidence: The government is now working on the establishment of a start-up fund to help provide seed capital for biotechnology companies.
reforms.importance_rationale: This initiative is significant as it aims to directly support the growth of innovative biotechnology firms, which are crucial for technological advancement.
reforms.source_quote: The government is now working on the establishment of a start-up fund to help provide seed capital for biotechnology companies.

reforms.description: The government has allocated FF 600 million from the opening-up of France Télécom's capital to a 'fund of funds' aimed at financing minority stakes in private venture capital companies, promoting investment in young technology-based firms.
reforms.component_name: Fund of Funds for Venture Capital
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: This initiative aims to increase the supply of capital for innovative firms, thereby fostering entrepreneurship and technological development.
reforms.status_evidence: The fund was established to support venture capital investments.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change in the venture capital landscape, aiming to enhance funding for innovative startups and improve the overall investment climate.
reforms.source_quote: The government has also allocated FF 600 million of the proceeds from the opening-up of the capital of France Télécom to a 'fund of funds' which will finance minority stakes in private venture capital companies.

reforms.description: A public venture capital fund has been launched to support innovative SMEs, alongside tax incentives for investments in new SMEs, aiming to stimulate entrepreneurship and innovation.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By providing financial support and incentives, this reform encourages the establishment and growth of innovative firms, enhancing the overall innovation ecosystem.
reforms.status_evidence: The public venture capital fund has been established to support innovative SMEs.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform is a major step in enhancing the financial support available for innovative SMEs, which is crucial for fostering a vibrant startup ecosystem.
reforms.source_quote: A public venture capital fund has been launched. The first 'thematic' research network has been set up in the telecommunications sector to improve the interface between public laboratories, private companies and operators.

reforms.description: A bill is set to be introduced to remove barriers to the commercial exploitation of public research findings, allowing universities and public research bodies to engage in industrial activities and set up business incubators.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: This reform aims to enhance the commercialization of research outputs, thereby facilitating technology transfer and fostering innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: A bill is soon to come before Parliament which will remove several barriers to the commercial exploitation of public research findings.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant shift in policy towards enhancing the role of public research in the economy, promoting innovation through better commercialization of research outputs.
reforms.source_quote: A bill is soon to come before Parliament which will remove several barriers to the commercial exploitation of public research findings.

reforms.description: The French government aims to modernize the education system by equipping schools with computers and improving internet access, targeting a reduction in the average number of pupils per microcomputer by the year 2000.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing IT skills among students is expected to improve human capital, which is crucial for future innovation and productivity.
reforms.status_evidence: The government has announced its intention to introduce IT and Internet courses for all students in teacher training colleges.
reforms.importance_rationale: This initiative represents a significant effort to integrate technology into education, which can have lasting impacts on the skill development of future generations.
reforms.source_quote: The government has also announced that it intends to introduce IT and Internet courses for all students in teacher training colleges for the next school year.

reforms.description: The French government is implementing the Sesam-Vitale chip card system to replace paper social security cards, facilitating electronic transmittal of social security forms and improving efficiency in health reimbursements.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The modernization of health systems through technology is expected to enhance efficiency and reduce costs, contributing positively to the economy.
reforms.status_evidence: By mid-1999, 35 million insured households should have received the Sesam-Vitale chip card.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant step towards digitizing health services, which can lead to improved service delivery and cost savings.
reforms.source_quote: By mid-1999, 35 million insured households should have received the Sesam-Vitale chip card, which is meant to replace the paper social security card.
